title: Content-Driven Personal Portfolio System
shortDescription: A premium, modular portfolio architecture with dynamic services, project case studies, editable content files, responsive design, and lightweight motion.
overview: This website is designed as a long-term personal brand system rather than a fixed one-page template.
Services and projects are data-driven, detailed pages are generated dynamically, and new content can be added without redesigning the interface.
problem: A conventional portfolio quickly becomes difficult to maintain as new skills, services, projects, images, and case studies are added.
solution: I built a reusable component system and content architecture that automatically connects services with projects and supports future growth.
results: Simpler content updates and project expansion
